description:
**Strategic context:**
This task -> verifies the remaining analytics backend batch from [OPN-158](/OPN/issues/OPN-158) -> makes the analytics API slice safe to ship without reopening five serial audit loops -> unblocks closure of [OPN-161](/OPN/issues/OPN-161), [OPN-163](/OPN/issues/OPN-163), [OPN-164](/OPN/issues/OPN-164), and [OPN-165](/OPN/issues/OPN-165).

## Original task specification
Audit the combined analytics backend implementation corresponding to [OPN-161](/OPN/issues/OPN-161) (shared contracts), [OPN-163](/OPN/issues/OPN-163) (analytics read routes/service), [OPN-164](/OPN/issues/OPN-164) (daily rollup cron plus platform backfill endpoint), and [OPN-165](/OPN/issues/OPN-165) (analytics tests).

This combined audit follows the direct CEO instruction on [OPN-158](/OPN/issues/OPN-158#comment-86cacb1e-5c21-43b5-87be-90db452eed7f) to treat the remaining analytics implementation as one code-complete batch instead of four separate audit loops.

## Changed files to audit
- packages/shared/src/analytics.ts
- packages/shared/src/index.ts
- packages/shared/src/analytics-contract.test.ts
- packages/api/src/routes/analytics.ts
- packages/api/src/routes/analytics.test.ts
- packages/api/src/services/analytics.ts
- packages/api/src/services/analytics.test.ts
- packages/api/src/routes/internal.ts
- packages/api/src/index.ts
- packages/api/src/db/010_platform_analytics.sql
- packages/api/src/db/schema.ts
- packages/api/src/db/schema.generated.ts
- packages/api/src/db/schema.test.ts
- packages/api/scripts/apply-migrations.mjs
- packages/api/scripts/generate-schema-module.mjs
- packages/api/scripts/run-tests.mjs

## Original acceptance criteria
1. Shared analytics Zod schemas and DTO exports exist in packages/shared
2. GET /v1/analytics/overview, /domains, /leaderboard/:domainId, and /topic/:topicId return valid JSON matching shared contracts
3. DAILY_ROLLUP_CRON populates platform_daily_rollups
4. POST /v1/internal/analytics/platform-rollups/backfill works for admin-authenticated requests
5. Tests cover contracts, analytics routes, and analytics services
6. pnpm --filter @opndomain/api test passes locally

## CTO quick-check results
- Read the shared analytics contracts, route handlers, analytics service, internal backfill route integration, worker cron wiring, and analytics-specific tests.
- Verified route registration in packages/api/src/index.ts and cron wiring for ollupPlatformDailyCounts under DAILY_ROLLUP_CRON.
- Verified shared exports in packages/shared/src/index.ts.
- Local verification passed: pnpm --filter @opndomain/api test (179/179 passing on 2026-03-29).
- Scope check: work remains backend/shared only; router and authority docs were not touched in this batch.

## Audit request
Review the changed files, fix what you can directly, and return:
- fixes applied (if any)
- remaining issues needing engineer or CTO action
- verdict: PASS / PASS WITH FIXES APPLIED / FAIL - NEEDS ENGINEER

## Constraints
- Do not widen scope beyond the analytics backend batch described above
- Do not modify router files or authority docs
- Keep fixes inside the listed file set unless an adjacent analytics test file is strictly required
